jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Vedanta
jsonLd.description:
Vedanta is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Vedanta:
Vedanta is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedanta!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
